usage: Code Health rule overrides, picked up by CodeScene from the repo root. The **/ent/** rule set silences ent-generated code (client.go, mutation.go, *_create/update/query/delete.go, predicates, hooks, migrations): it is regenerated by 'go generate' and never edited by hand, so its complexity is not actionable tech debt. Caveat: the glob also covers the hand-written ent/schema/** files; schema files are small declarative structs, so losing analysis there is an accepted trade-off (rule sets support only one path each and globs have no negation).

rules.name: Lines of Code in a Single File
Number of Functions in a Single Module
